name: YNX Oracle
title: YNX Oracle | Verifiable market data
metaDescription: Inspect YNX Oracle health, versions, source coverage, price quality, staleness, and circuit-breaker state.
risks: No public Oracle API is deployed
No provider is approved or active for YNX markets
Market data may be delayed, divergent, incomplete, or unavailable

faq.question: Can an HTTP 200 price be accepted directly?
faq.answer: No. Consumers must validate schema, source, version, time, coverage, confidence, failure, and circuit-breaker state.

faq.question: Is YNX Oracle publicly deployed?
faq.answer: No public Oracle API deployment is currently claimed.

faq.question: How many sources are required?
faq.answer: The default policy requires at least three independent active sources.
